info.title: Pingmee API
info.description: A complete guide to Pingmee micro service architecture.

delete.description: Deletes a conversation tag by id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of conversation tag to delete

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of conversation tag to get

post.description: Set the status of a conversation.

requestBody.description: Set the status of a conversation.

participantsIdentifiers.description: Unique identifiers of the conversation participants.

post.description: Set the answer mode for a conversation.

requestBody.description: Set the answer mode for a conversation.

participantsIdentifiers.description: Unique identifiers of the conversation participants.

get.description: Get a single conversation by participants identifiers.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifiers of the conversation participants.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifiers of the conversation participants.

requestBody.description: List of agent IDs to associate with the conversation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifiers of the conversation participants.

requestBody.description: List of agent IDs to remove from the conversation.

get.description: Returns the tag IDs assigned to a conversation. Path `id` is the conversation `participantsIdentifiers`.

200.description: Tag IDs currently assigned to the conversation

post.description: Assigns one or more tags to a conversation. Path `id` is the conversation `participantsIdentifiers` (URL-encoded).

400.description: Missing body, path id, or invalid tagIds

delete.description: Removes one or more tags from a conversation. Path `id` is the conversation `participantsIdentifiers` (URL-encoded).

200.description: Per-tag removal results; `errors` lists tag IDs that failed

400.description: Missing body, path id, or invalid tagIds

requestBody.description: Provide pagination and filtering parameters to retrieve the next page of conversations.

phoneNumberId.description: Filter conversations by phone number identifier.

startKey.description: Key returned from a previous request. Pass this value to fetch the next page of conversations.

limit.description: Maximum number of conversations to return.

dbObject.description: List of conversations returned for this page of results.

lastEvaluatedKey.description: If present, call the same endpoint again and pass this value as `startKey` to retrieve the next page of results. Pagination is cursor-based.

requestBody.description: Optionally provide pagination parameters to retrieve the next page of customers.

lastEvaluatedKey.description: Key returned from the previous request. Pass this value to fetch the next page of results.

limit.description: Maximum number of customers to return.

customers.description: List of customers returned for this page of results.

lastEvaluatedKey.description: If present, call the same endpoint again and pass this value as `lastEvaluatedKey` to retrieve the next page of results. Pagination is cursor-based, not page-number based.

requestBody.description: A list of customers to create

delete.description: Deletes a single customer based on the ID supplied

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Phone number ID of the customer to delete.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Phone number ID of the customer to get

get.description: Get WhatsApp templates for a specific phone number

parameters.name: phoneNumberId
parameters.description: Phone number ID to fetch templates for

context.description: Reply to an existing WhatsApp message

sentMessage.description: Returned only when initiator is bot or ai

post.description: Fetches messages for a conversation identified by the business phone number and the customer (target) phone number. Results are ordered newest first. Omit `startKey` on the first request. For each following batch, set `startKey` to the `lastEvaluatedKey` value returned by the previous response.

get.description: Returns all agents associated with the authenticated account.
Returns a single agent by ID (email).
Returns all webhooks for the authenticated account.

url.description: Callback URL to receive webhook events

id.description: Unique identifier of the created webhook

parameters.name: webhookId
parameters.description: ID of the webhook to delete

color.description: Tag color (hex, rgb, or named color)

associatedTo.description: Business or account the tag is associated with

customerName.description: The name from WhatsApp or the originating platform

customerNickname.description: The name the business gave the customer

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the customer was created

lastActiveAt.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the customer was last active

platform.description: Messaging platform the customer is associated with

associatedTo.description: Business or account the customer is associated with

profileImage.description: Profile image URL if available, if not provided we try and find a matching profile picture for that phone number.

customerNickname.description: Custom name to identify the customer in the business (not seen by the end user)

phoneNumberId.description: Phone number identifier including country code. (9725xxxxxxxx)

associatedTo.description: Business or account the conversation is associated with.

participantsIdentifiers.description: Unique identifiers of the conversation participants.

lastMessage.description: Last message exchanged in the conversation.

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the conversation was created.

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the conversation was last updated.

unreadCount.description: Number of unread messages in the conversation.

assignedTagIds.description: List of assigned conversation tag IDs.

lastWorkflowExecutionId.description: Identifier of the last workflow execution.

lastSendMessageFromUser.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) of the last message sent by the user.

isOptoutFromMarketingMessages.description: Indicates whether the customer opted out of marketing messages.

WhatsAppMessageContext.description: Reply context for a WhatsApp message

AITranslation.description: AI translation payload for the message

WhatsAppErrorMessage.description: WhatsApp / platform error details when sending failed

AgentIdentification.description: Agent who sent or handled the message

Message.description: A prepared message returned by getMessages

initiator.description: Who initiated the message (`Initiator`, e.g. person, bot, ai)

messagePlatform.description: Platform the message was sent on (`PlatformType`)

creationPlatform.description: Platform where the message was created (`PlatformType`)

informativeMessageType.description: System / informative message subtype when applicable (`InformativeMessageType`)

MessagesCursorKey.description: Pagination cursor. Returned as `lastEvaluatedKey` in the response; send the same object as `startKey` on the next request to load the next batch. Shape: `{ "messageId": "<string>", "createdAt": <number> }` (Unix milliseconds). Omit `startKey` on the first request.

messageId.description: Message ID from the pagination cursor (`lastEvaluatedKey`)

GetMessagesRequest.description: Use `startKey` only after the first page: set it to `lastEvaluatedKey` from the prior response to fetch the next batch.

dbObject.description: Messages (newest first), each a prepared `Message` object

hasMoreItemsToFetch.description: Whether more messages exist beyond this page

lastEvaluatedKey.description: When present, use this value as `startKey` in the next request to fetch the next batch of (older) messages.

tagIds.description: Tag IDs to assign (POST) or remove (DELETE) from the conversation

errors.description: Human-readable messages for tags that failed to remove; empty when all succeeded

event.description: Event type the webhook is subscribed to
